creator: bsd@abinet.ru
text:
Created attachment 152055
patch

Xorg have a bug under some WMs if they try to set 1px border. 
It was fixed in upstream. http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/commit/?id=863d528a9f76d0e8f122aebf19f8564a4c67a938

In attachments the example pictures and a patch. Patch was taken from upstream and tested on my desktop (FreeBSD 10.1 amd64).
